blended.narrative: Hoodoo is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 7".
